context.description: A philosophical prose passage argues that thoughts and actions are driven by unconscious mechanisms, forming a self-reinforcing cycle of self-image and self-interest. The section heading is "Das Problem der Selbstdefinition," and the text contrasts psychology's pain relief role with a sharper critique of its limits. It also links the inner split of the wanderer figure to doubt, repression, terror, and forgetting.
normalization_notes: Translated German visible text into English control-language summary.

rows.paragraph_text: Thoughts and actions are largely determined by unconscious mechanisms hidden beyond self-perception, and conscious self-image in turn acts back on those mechanisms. This creates a vicious cycle that sustains self-interest and resistance to contradiction.
rows.text_content: Thoughts and actions are largely determined by unconscious mechanisms hidden beyond self-perception, and conscious self-image in turn acts back on those mechanisms. This creates a vicious cycle that sustains self-interest and resistance to contradiction.

rows.paragraph_text: The wanderer figure is portrayed as trapped in an inner darkness that drives him from doubt into repression, from terror into forgetting, and from one world into another.
rows.text_content: The wanderer figure is portrayed as trapped in an inner darkness that drives him from doubt into repression, from terror into forgetting, and from one world into another.

rows.paragraph_text: Psychology is acknowledged as useful for easing suffering, but it is also criticized as an overconfident attempt to cure the pain of contradiction while philosophers and neuroscientists are named as part of a broader inquiry into the hidden self.
rows.text_content: Psychology is acknowledged as useful for easing suffering, but it is also criticized as an overconfident attempt to cure the pain of contradiction while philosophers and neuroscientists are named as part of a broader inquiry into the hidden self.

rows.paragraph_text: The argument then turns toward a harder position, rejecting that therapeutic framing and preparing the next claim.
rows.text_content: The argument then turns toward a harder position, rejecting that therapeutic framing and preparing the next claim.
